details: Connect to remote servers and external runtime capabilities.

agentOps.appDescription: Connect to remote servers and external runtime capabilities.

fields.label: Auth secret group
fields.help_text: Optional. If set, this node resolves authentication secrets from the selected secret group by assignment key or grouped secret name.

fields.label: Tool arguments JSON
fields.help_text: Optional. Rendered JSON object passed as the MCP tool arguments.

fields.label: Auth token secret name
fields.help_text: Optional. Resolve a secret and inject it into the configured auth header.

fields.label: Auth token provider
fields.help_text: Optional. Leave blank to search all enabled providers in scope.

fields.label: Auth header name
fields.help_text: Optional. Defaults to `Authorization` when a stored Secret object is configured for auth.

fields.label: Auth header template
fields.help_text: Optional. Use `{token}` where the resolved secret should be inserted. Leave blank to send the raw token.

fields.label: Extra headers JSON
fields.help_text: Optional non-secret headers merged into every request. Auth and session headers are managed separately from stored Secret objects.
